generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder sensor for position and velocity measurements on MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotDataMQTTStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder sensor for position and velocity measurements on MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotDataMQTTStream
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current (I_M) for MABI MAX 100 first axis motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotDataMQTTStream
]

instance RobotDataMQTTStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensors
    base:desc "MQTT protocol data stream transmitting sensor data including position, velocity, and current measurements"
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current (I_M) data trace from motor sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) data trace from gearbox sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) data trace from motor sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis structural model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SysML_InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis structural model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance Simulink_CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Coulomb-Viscous friction model for robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model for robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl friction model for robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre friction model for robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AAS_Instance : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural representation of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for visualizing motion accuracy improvements"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous friction model identification using white-box and black-box models for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight, AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization service for monitoring robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification results used to adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control algorithms based on friction identification results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotionAccuracyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of motion accuracy metrics"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis"
    base:contains MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensors, SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram, SysML_InternalBlockDiagram, Simulink_CoulombViscousModel, Simulink_StribeckModel, Simulink_DahlModel, Simulink_LuGreModel, AAS_Instance
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating structural SysML models, behavioral Simulink friction models, live sensor data via MQTT, and unified dashboard visualization for continuous friction identification"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase during robot operation"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data versus measured data to validate friction models; deviation analysis for model accuracy"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards"
]
